title: Shiva temple in Narayanapur
tagline: Shiva temple in Narayanapur — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Shiva temple in Narayanapur village in Bidar district.
overview.description: The Shiva temple in Narayanapur village in Bidar district. The temple is about 4 km from Basavakalyan town. The temple is a showcase of Kalyani Chalukyan architecture.

topPlaces.name: Narayanapur, Bidar
topPlaces.description: Narayanapur is a village situated 3 kilometres away from Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district in the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Ujlam
topPlaces.description: Ujalamb is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district.

topPlaces.description: Belura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district and falls under the Hulsoor police jurisdiction.

topPlaces.name: Rajeshwar
topPlaces.description: Rajeshwar is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district in Karnataka, which is on NH-9.

topPlaces.name: Basavakalyan
topPlaces.description: Basavakalyan is a historical city and municipal council in the Bidar District of the Indian state of Karnataka. It was the capital of the Kalyani Chalukyas and the Kalachuris of Kalyani.

topPlaces.name: Anubhava Mantapa
topPlaces.description: Anubhava Mantapa, established by Basavanna in the 12th century C.E., is a religious complex located in Tipranth, Basavakalyan, in the Bidar district of Karnataka. It is the first religious parliament in the world, whose name is literally translated as "experience pavilion", and was an academy of mystics, saints and philosophers of the lingayat faith in the 12th century.

items.note: Narayanapur is a village situated 3 kilometres away from Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district in the Indian state of Karnataka.
Ujalamb is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district.
Mirkhal is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district.
Belura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district and falls under the Hulsoor police jurisdiction.
Rajeshwar is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Basavakalyan taluk of Bidar district in Karnataka, which is on NH-9.
Basavakalyan is a historical city and municipal council in the Bidar District of the Indian state of Karnataka. It was the capital of the Kalyani Chalukyas and the Kalachuris of Kalyani.

Anubhava Mantapa, established by Basavanna in the 12th century C.E., is a religious complex located in Tipranth, Basavakalyan, in the Bidar district of Karnataka. It is the first religious parliament in the world, whose name is literally translated as "experience pavilion", and was an academy of mystics, saints and philosophers of the lingayat faith in the 12th century.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shiva temple in Narayanapur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shiva temple in Narayanapur is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shiva temple in Narayanapur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Nanded Airport (152 km) and the nearest railway station is Solapur Junction (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shiva temple in Narayanapur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shiva temple in Narayanapur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shiva temple in Narayanapur?
faq.a: Stays in Shiva temple in Narayanapur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shiva temple in Narayanapur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narayanapur, Bidar, Ujlam, Mirkhal, Belura, Rajeshwar.
